title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University uses AI tools including AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic vaccine targets for early-onset breast cancer in Uganda. The team analyzed protein binding sites and narrowed 15,000 candidates to 15 viable targets for laboratory validation using only a laptop and server.
